# Copilot Instructions

This is a Next.js starter template for StackBlaze.

## When checking for updates
- Check for latest stable Next.js and React versions
- Update Node.js version references to current LTS
- Check for deprecated Next.js APIs (pages vs app router, config changes)
- Verify package.json scripts and next.config are up to date
- Keep the template minimal — this is a hello-world starter
